network_summary: All three locations (Wilmette Family Dental / Jim Limperis DMD, Winning Smile Dental Group / Dr. Polly Reese, and Cityscape Dental / Dr. Danielle DeArmond) are confirmed Imagen Dental Partners DPO partner practices. Bella Zaritsky appears on LinkedIn as affiliated with Imagen Dental Partners, consistent with her role as the credentialing/administrative authorized official across the three Imagen-managed practices. Imagen Dental Partners LLC provides centralized management services (HR, IT, finance, marketing, compliance, revenue cycle management) to dentist-owned practices while retaining a management-company layer — its own website copyright and 'An Imagen Partner Practice' footers on all three practice websites confirm this structure. Imagen self-describes as 'doctor-led, not private equity-owned'; no PE sponsor found. The AO cluster therefore reflects Imagen's internal management infrastructure, not a dentist who personally owns all three offices.
owner_operator_identity: Imagen Dental Partners LLC (DPO/management company); individual practice operators: Dr. Jim Limperis DMD (Wilmette Family Dental), Dr. Polly Reese (Winning Smile Dental Group), Dr. Danielle DeArmond DDS / Dr. Crystal Mangat DMD (Cityscape Dental). Bella Zaritsky is Imagen Dental Partners staff (credentialing/admin AO), not the practice owner.
durable_artifacts: Bella Zaritsky is authorized official on NPIs 1871314286 (Jim Limperis DMD Inc., Wilmette 60091), 1851125405 (Winning Smile Dental Group LLC, Evanston 60201), and 1265253678 (Danielle DeArmond DDS PC, Chicago 60606)
All three practices display 'An Imagen Partner Practice' on their websites and carry '© Imagen® Dental Partners LLC' copyright
Winning Smile Dental Group NexHealth booking URL explicitly routes through Imagen-Dental-Partners
Bella Zaritsky LinkedIn lists employer as Imagen Dental Partners (Winter Garden location = Imagen HQ)
Wilmette Family Dental and Winning Smile Dental Group appear as named partner logos on imagendentalpartners.com/location/illinois/
Cityscape Dental careers redirect to careers.imagendentalpartners.com confirming management-services relationship
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Imagen Dental Partners LLC operates as a Dental Partnership Organization (DPO) providing centralized management services (HR, IT, finance, marketing, compliance, revenue cycle management) to partner practices — confirmed at https://www.imagendentalpartners.com/partner-services/ and https://www.imagendentalpartners.com/about-us/. All three practices in this cluster display 'An Imagen Partner Practice' with '© Imagen® Dental Partners LLC' in footers. No private equity sponsor identified; Imagen explicitly states 'doctor-led, not private equity-owned' at https://www.imagendentalpartners.com/about-us/.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: The NPPES entity names (JIM LIMPERIS DMD INC., DANIELLE DEARMOND DDS PC) are historic legal-entity names; the consumer-facing brands are Wilmette Family Dental, Cityscape Dental, and Winning Smile Dental Group. All three practices appear operationally active as of June 2026. Bella Zaritsky is a management-company AO (Imagen staff), not a dentist owner — this cluster is an Imagen DPO platform cluster, not a personal multi-office dentist group.
evidence_chain: AO signal: BELLA ZARITSKY appears as authorized official on NPPES records for three separate GP practice organizations across three Chicagoland ZIPs (60091, 60201, 60606). Documentary corroboration: (1) Bella Zaritsky LinkedIn confirms affiliation with Imagen Dental Partners; (2) Imagen Dental Partners Illinois page (imagendentalpartners.com/location/illinois/) lists both Wilmette Family Dental and Winning Smile Dental Group as named IL partner practices; (3) Winning Smile Dental Group has a dedicated partner announcement page at imagendentalpartners.com/winning-smile-dental-group/ confirming March 2023 DPO affiliation; (4) Wilmette Family Dental website (wilmettefamilydental.com/about/) identifies practice as 'An Imagen Partner Practice' with Imagen copyright; (5) Cityscape Dental website (cityscapedentalchicago.com/about/) — the operating brand for DANIELLE DEARMOND DDS PC at 150 N Wacker — identifies practice as 'An Imagen Partner Practice' with Imagen copyright and careers redirecting to careers.imagendentalpartners.com; (6) NexHealth booking system URL for Cityscape Dental explicitly routes through 'Imagen-Dental-Partners'. Result: AO cluster is entirely explained by Imagen Dental Partners' internal credentialing/administrative staff performing the authorized-official function across their IL partner network.
future_app_notes: All three practices should be reclassified from their current entity_classification (solo_high_volume / small_group / solo_high_volume) to dso_regional or dso_national depending on Imagen's scale. Imagen Dental Partners operates across multiple US states with 10+ IL partners visible on their locator — likely qualifies as dso_regional at minimum. Validate whether additional IL practices in the GP database are Imagen partners (CityScape Dental, Impressive Smiles, Generations Dental, Lakeside Dental, Village Green Dentistry, Celebrating Smiles, Forest City Dental also appear on Imagen IL page). Check if Imagen has grown to dso_national scale (10+ states) for the national tier. PE status should be re-checked periodically — Imagen is growing rapidly and could attract PE in future.
